license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wgsfbwe
title: Protocol for DNA Extraction from Urine
author: A. Lenore Ackerman

steps_raw.instruction: Spin 30 ml for 15 minutes at 1500 X G at room temperature
Pour off supernatant into a separate, 50 ml tube and store at -80 c.Enzymatic Disruption
Resuspend pellets in 500 uL Enzyme buffer (0.5 M Tris, 1 mM EDTA, 0.2% 2-mercaptoethanol, pH 7.5) in a 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube
Add Enzymes: 100 uL Lyticase (2000 U/ml) and 100 uL Lysozyme (100 mg/ml)
Incubate at 30°C for 30 minutes, inverting every 5-10 minutes
Centrifuge at 4000 rcf for 5 minutes
Remove supernatantMechanical Disruption
Resuspend pellet in 800 uL Stool DNA stabilizer
Add Beads: 100 uL 0.1 mm beads and 300 uL 0.5 mm beads
Bead beat on high for 1 minute
Spin briefly at 17,000 X G
Bead beat on high for 1 minuteThermal Disruption
Heat at 95°C for 5 minutes
Vortex for 5 seconds
Heat at 95°C for 5 minutes
Vortex for 5 seconds
Cool on ice for 5 minutes
Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minuteDNA Extraction
For each sample, add 350 ml to each of 2 1.5 ml tubes
Add 10 ul proteinase K mixture (Qiagen #1017738) to each sample
Add 250 ul Buffer AL+Carrier [Poly (A) Sigma-Aldrich #10108626001 10ng/ml] to each sample
Vortex for 15 seconds
Incubate at 70°C for 10 minutes
Add 250 uL 100% EtOH to each sample
Mix by vortexing for 5 seconds
Transfer mixture from first tube to QIAamp Mini Spin Column (#1011706) and centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minute
Change collection tube, transfer mixture from second tube to spin column and centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minute
Change collection tube and add 500 uL Buffer AW1 to column
Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minute
Change collection tube and add 500 uL AW2 to column
Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 3 minutes
Remove residual EtOH by centrifuging an additional 1 min at max
Transfer column to new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube
Add 50 uL Buffer AE to column, incubate at RT for 5 minutes and spin at 17,000 X G for 1 minute
Transfer fluid from collection tube back to spin column and repeat last step
Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop 2000 Spectrophotometer
